papers.title: Cosmos 3: Omnimodal World Models for Physical AI
papers.summary: NVIDIA presents Cosmos 3, omnimodal world models for Physical AI that learn joint representations across video, text, action, and simulation modalities. Significant advancement in world models that can simulate physical environments for embodied AI and autonomous systems.

papers.title: GeoDrive-Bench: Benchmarking Region-Specific Multimodal Reasoning in Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: Benchmark evaluating VLM geo-cultural driving reasoning across 6 countries. 5053 human-validated QA pairs covering perception, prediction, planning, region reasoning. Proposes distillation algorithm for injecting region-specific traffic knowledge into VLMs.

papers.title: See Less, Specify More: Visual Evidence Budgets for Generalizable VLAs
papers.summary: Proposes S2 framework for improving VLA generalization by training executor under cleaner interface. Introduces visual evidence budget to train executor from task-sufficient evidence rather than unconstrained visual context, without mask annotations. Addresses generalization in vision-language-action models.

papers.title: AURA-Mem: Action-Gated Memory for Robot Policies at Constant VRAM
papers.summary: KV-cache is wrong memory for robots. AURA-Mem wraps frozen VLA backbone with constant-size recurrent memory and learned gate that writes only when observation changes next action. 4224 bytes inference state regardless of horizon vs KV-cache growing 6061x larger at 100k steps. On LIBERO-Long matches ungated base policy with 7x fewer writes.

papers.title: SeeTraceAct: Visibility-Aware Latent Planning from Cross-Embodiment Demonstration Videos
papers.summary: Demo-conditioned VLA framework for one-shot robot policy learning from single demonstration video. Proposes visibility-aware prediction of future end-effector traces. Introduces RoboCasa-DC benchmark. Franka Panda arm conditioned on human demonstrations achieves 12.5% real-world improvement.

papers.title: CARVE: Certified Affordable Repair of Vetoed Maneuvers via Envelopes for Interactive Driving
papers.summary: Prediction-free certificate layer for interactive driving that identifies when a hard-rule margin is negative for ego but a small accommodation by non-priority agent restores feasibility. Formalizes interactive repair certification with cooperation envelopes separating kinematic reachability from normative priority.

papers.title: Too Much of a Good Thing: When sim2real Efforts Impede Policy Learning (And What to Do About It)
papers.summary: Argues that sim2real efforts have led to misaligned incentives with policy learning, causing simulator lock-in and poor exploration. Proposes sim2sim2real paradigm leveraging robot kinematics as sole design constraint.

papers.title: Motion Planning in Dynamic Environments: A Survey from Classical to Modern Methods
papers.summary: Comprehensive survey of 138 works (2015-2025) on motion planning in dynamic environments. Groups methods into sampling, graph search, MPC, learning-based, and classical local planning categories.

papers.title: SparseWorld: Enhancing End-to-End Autonomous Driving via World Models with Sparse Scene Representation
Reason--Imagine--Act: Closed-Loop LLM Decision Making with World Models for Autonomous Driving
AnyScene: Towards Highly Controllable Driving Scene Generation at Anywhere and Beyond
Decision-Making with Lightweight Confidence-Aware Language Model for Autonomous Driving
RoVES: Physics-Aware 3D Gaussian Editing for Driving Scene Generation
RECTOR: Priority-Aware Rule-Based Reranking for Compliance-Aware Autonomous Driving Trajectory Selection
D2-V2X: Depth-Driven Cooperative V2X Reasoning for Autonomous Driving
Fast-dDrive: Efficient Block-Diffusion VLM for Autonomous Driving
NTR: Neural Token Reconstruction for Scene Token Bottleneck in End-to-End Driving
papers.abstract: Perception-free E2E driving with masked latent reconstruction for scene-token bottleneck. SOTA on Waymo E2E (8.0461 RFS) and NavSim1&2 (94.1 PDMS). Self-distillation framework preserves richer visual representations without explicit perception heads.

papers.title: VisualThink-VLA: Visual Intermediate Reasoning for Effective and Low-Latency Vision-Language-Action Policies
papers.summary: 提出视觉中间推理VLA框架，用紧凑视觉证据接口替代文本CoT，实现22.8倍加速(8.4s→0.37s)同时保持高成功率。引入VisualEvidence-Kit审计资源。

papers.title: Deformable Gaussian Occupancy: Decoupling Rigid and Nonrigid Motion with Factorized Distillation
papers.summary: 提出DeGO框架，解耦刚性和非刚性运动的高斯占用预测。使用因子化4D基础模型蒸馏，在Occ3D-NuScenes上达到SOTA，人类实例提升13.5%，整体提升10.9%。

papers.title: GEM: Generative Supervision Helps Embodied Intelligence
papers.summary: 在VLM预训练中引入深度图生成任务作为生成式监督，显著提升具身智能体的语义理解和物理操作能力。发布GEM-4M数据集，在多个具身基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: DriveWAM: Video Generative Priors Enable Scalable World-Action Modeling for Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: 将预训练视频扩散Transformer适配为自回归视频-动作世界动作模型。统一视频与动作为时序token序列，联合流匹配训练。引入场景演化驾驶引导（frozen VLM产生语义意图指导生成）+选择性KV记忆缓存。NAVSIM和PhysicalAI基准强规划性能，4k→100k数据缩放实验证实scale潜力。

papers.title: FineVLA: Fine-Grained Instruction Alignment for Steerable Vision-Language-Action Policies
papers.authors: Xintong Hu, Xuhong Huang, Jinyu Zhang et al.
papers.abstract: 提出 FineVLA 框架，统一 10 个开源机器人数据集（972K 轨迹，85K 任务），构建 FineVLA-Data 细粒度数据集（47K 细粒度轨迹）。包含 VLM 标注器、500 视频的 held-out benchmark。训练可引导的 VLA 策略，支持细粒度指令控制。
papers.key_contribution: 首个大规模精细粒度 VLA 监督框架，实现可引导的机器人策略学习

papers.title: TPS-Drive: Task-Guided Representation Purification for VLM-based Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: 提出 TPS-Drive 框架，核心是 Agent-Centric Tokenizer 通过 task-guided VQ 机制将 codebook 容量从静态背景重分配到动态 agent。采用解耦推理 pipeline（场景理解→未来预测→动作生成），三阶段训练范式 + reward-driven 优化。在 nuScenes 开放循环和 NAVSIMv1/v2 闭环基准上取得新安全记录。
papers.key_contribution: 任务导向表示净化方法，解决 VLM 在驾驶中的空间幻觉和表示干扰问题

papers.title: Can VLA Models Learn from Real-World Data Continually without Forgetting?
papers.abstract: 首个面向真实世界场景的 VLA 持续学习实证研究。构建包含 4 个顺序操作任务的真实数据集（刚性物体抓取、接触按压、可变形折叠）。发现 VLA 模型遭受严重灾难性遗忘，系统评估 experience replay 及关键实现因素。提供部署长期机器人策略的实践指导。
papers.key_contribution: 首次真实环境 VLA 持续学习研究，揭示灾难性遗忘严重程度及缓解方案

papers.title: ParkingWorld: End-to-End Autonomous Parking Reinforcement Learning from Corrective Experience in 3DGS Simulation
papers.abstract: 提出 CIL-SERL 框架，在 3DGS 逼真模拟器中训练端到端自主泊车。设计多级 replay buffer 机制实现 correction-in-the-loop 样本高效强化学习。定位为下阶段重点分析对象。
papers.key_contribution: 3DGS 仿真 + 纠错回放 buffer 实现样本高效的端到端自主泊车 RL 训练

papers.title: ChainFlow-VLA: Causal Flow Matching Planning with Visual-Language-Action Models for Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: 因果流匹配VLA驾驶规划器。利用VLM推理能力通过思维链输出规划指令，结合因果流匹配CFG生成安全轨迹。可视化因果关系图增强可解释性。

papers.title: Sensor2Sensor: Cross-Embodiment Sensor Conversion for Autonomous Driving
papers.reasoning: 将dashcam视频转化为多模态AV传感器数据(相机+LiDAR)，解决数据稀缺问题。使用4DGS重建+扩散架构。创新性强但偏数据工具。
papers.abstract: Robust training and validation of Autonomous Driving Systems (ADS) require massive, diverse datasets. Proprietary data collected by Autonomous Vehicle (AV) fleets, while high-fidelity, are limited in scale, diversity of sensor configurations, as well as geographic and long-tail-behavioral coverage. Sensor2Sensor proposes a novel generative modeling paradigm that translates in-the-wild monocular dashcam videos into a high-fidelity, multi-modal sensor suite (AV logs) comprising multi-view camera images and LiDAR point clouds.
papers.authors: Jiahao Wang, Bo Sun, Yijing Bai et al. (Waymo/Google)
papers.summary: CVPR 2026。将网络行车记录仪视频生成多模态传感器数据（多视角相机+LiDAR），4DGS构建伪配对数据用于训练扩散模型，解锁海量外部驾驶数据。

papers.title: Semantic Safety Arbitration over Structured Futures for Latency-Decoupled LLM Planning
papers.summary: SteinsGateDrive：延迟解耦的LLM规划器架构。LLM在控制窗口前选择反事实驾驶未来（worldline），运行时仅在安全合约有效时复用预测。生成三种worldline：alpha自我轨迹、beta周边交互反事实、gamma危险场景。GPT-5.4 mini在4秒预测窗口下有效延迟从+3.07s降至-0.01s，维持零碰撞安全边界。

papers.title: Pre-VLA: Preemptive Runtime Verification for Reliable Vision-Language-Action and World-Model Rollouts
papers.reasoning: 提出Pre-VLA运行时验证框架，同时覆盖VLA和世界模型rollout的安全检查。将runtime verification方法引入VLA部署，对实际应用可靠性至关重要。
papers.abstract: While large vision-language-action (VLA) models and generative world models (WM) have advanced long-horizon embodied intelligence, their practical deployment remains challenged by uncertainty in learning-based action generation. Pre-VLA proposes preemptive runtime verification to identify low-quality actions before execution.

papers.title: Beyond Euclidean Proximity: Repairing Latent World Models with Horizon-Matched Trajectory Reachability Metrics
papers.authors: Liangyu Li, Shengzhi Wang, Qingwen Liu
papers.summary: 揭示潜空间MPC的核心缺陷——终端成本函数使用欧氏距离作为目标状态的可达性度量，这会导致决策信息失真。提出horizon-matched trajectory reachability metrics替代方案，修复潜世界模型的规划接口。

papers.title: LVDrive: Latent Visual Representation Enhanced Vision-Language-Action Autonomous Driving Model
papers.reasoning: 提出隐式视觉表示增强VLA驾驶模型，解决稀疏动作监督问题。核心是LV Drive框架，端到端驾驶VLA方向重要贡献。
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a promising framework for end-to-end autonomous driving. However, existing VLAs typically rely on sparse action supervision, which underutilizes their powerful scene understanding and reasoning capabilities. LVDrive proposes a Latent Visual Representation enhanced Vision-Language-Action Autonomous Driving Model that bridges this gap.
papers.summary: 隐空间视觉表示增强的 VLA 驾驶框架。在隐空间中进行未来场景预测并联合建模运动和场景，单次前向传播完成未来感知推理。Bench2Drive 闭环评测超越纯动作监督和图像重建方法。

papers.title: CrossVLA: Cross-Paradigm Post-Training and Inference Optimization for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.reasoning: 系统研究VLA两种主流架构(离散token自回归 vs 连续动作flow-matching)的DPO偏好对齐和推理优化。对VLA实用化部署有直接指导意义。
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have rapidly converged on a small set of architectural patterns: discrete-token autoregression (e.g. OpenVLA) and continuous-action flow-matching (e.g. pi-0.5). CrossVLA explores preference alignment via DPO across both paradigms.

papers.title: Grounding Driving VLA via Inverse Kinematics
papers.reasoning: 发现Driving VLA忽略视觉token的问题，用逆运动学视角重新定义轨迹恢复任务。对驾驶VLA的结构性改进有重要意义。
papers.abstract: Existing Driving VLAs predict trajectories while largely ignoring their visual tokens -- a phenomenon we trace not to insufficient training but to a structurally ill-posed task formulation. Grounding Driving VLA via Inverse Kinematics shows that trajectory recovery, through the lens of inverse kinematics, provides a principled grounding mechanism.

papers.title: STELLAR: Scaling 3D Perception Large Models for Autonomous Driving
papers.reasoning: 自动驾驶3D感知大模型的scaling方法。与BEV感知、端到端感知相关。
papers.abstract: STELLAR tackles scaling 3D perception large models specifically for autonomous driving, addressing the unique challenges of the driving domain.
papers.authors: Yingwei Li, Xin Huang, Yang Liu, Yang Fu et al. (Waymo/Google)
papers.summary: Waymo 自动驾驶 3D 感知大模型。Sparse Window Transformer 支持 LiDAR+Radar+Camera+Map，5000万×5亿参数训练。揭示自动驾驶感知的 scaling law，Waymo Open Dataset SOTA。

papers.title: BeyondDrive: Beyond Imitation — Learning Safe End-to-End Autonomous Driving from Hard Negatives
papers.authors: Junli Wang, Zhihua Hua, Xueyi Liu et al.
papers.abstract: Existing imitation learning methods for end-to-end autonomous driving predominantly learn from successful demonstrations by minimizing geometric deviations from expert trajectories. This paradigm implicitly assumes that spatial proximity implies behavioral safety, leading to a critical objective mismatch. To address this limitation, we propose BeyondDrive, a failure-aware imitation learning framework that jointly learns from successful and failed driving behaviors.
papers.comments: 89.7 PDMS on NAVSIMv1. Uses flow matching for negative trajectory generation. Zero-shot transfer to HUGSIM.
papers.summary: 失败感知模仿学习框架，Flow Matching 生成接近专家轨迹的硬负样本，Repulsive Distance Loss 同时吸引真实轨迹、排斥负样本。NAVSIMv1 89.7 PDMS SOTA，零样本迁移到 HUGSIM。

papers.title: HEAT: Heterogeneous End-to-End Autonomous Driving via Trajectory-Guided World Models
papers.abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving has emerged as a compelling alternative to traditional modular pipelines by directly mapping raw sensor data to driving actions. While recent approaches achieve strong performance on single-domain datasets, their performance degrades significantly when trained jointly across multiple heterogeneous domains. To address this, we propose a trajectory-driven learning paradigm that organizes training around planning trajectories, enabling the model to capture domain-invariant representations of driving intent. Furthermore, we incorporate a world model that predicts future latent features conditioned on ego actions.
papers.comments: Evaluated on nuScenes, NAVSIM, Waymo. Uses trajectory-guided world model for domain-invariant feature learning.
papers.summary: 端到端多域联合训练方法。轨迹驱动学习让模型捕捉跨域不变驾驶意图，世界模型预测未来隐特征消除域偏置。单一模型在 nuScenes、NAVSIM、Waymo 上均取得实质性改进。

papers.title: SafeAlign-VLA: A Negative-Enhanced Safe Alignment Framework for Risk-Aware Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving systems excel in common scenarios but struggle with safety-critical long-tail cases. Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are promising due to their strong reasoning capabilities. However, most VLA-based approaches rely on positive expert demonstrations, rarely exploiting negative samples, leading to insufficient understanding of risky behaviors and safety boundaries. To address this limitation, we propose SafeAlign-VLA, a unified negative-enhanced safe alignment framework that incorporates negative data into supervised learning and reinforcement learning.
papers.comments: 89.1 PDMS on NAVSIM v1. Collision rate 3.36%. Uses counterfactual reasoning + group relative policy optimization.

papers.title: A Joint World Model Integrating Reconstruction and Generation for Autonomous Driving
papers.title_cn: 面向自动驾驶的重建与生成联合世界模型
papers.authors: Lijun Zhou, Hongcheng Luo, Zhenxin Zhu, et al.
papers.summary: JWM统一世界模型的表示(WorldRec/3D高斯重建)与生成(WorldGen/双向预训练+因果微调)能力。4步去噪即可实现高质量因果视频生成，支撑闭环仿真与端到端训练。Xiaomi EV技术报告。

papers.title: Contrastive Latent-space Prompt Optimization for End-to-end Autonomous Driving
papers.title_cn: 对比隐空间提示优化的端到端自动驾驶
papers.summary: CLAP提出对比隐空间提示优化，利用V2X通信为VLA驾驶模型按路段作软提示优化。在NAVSIM上减少24%长尾场景规划错误，正常场景无退化。

papers.title: DriveMoe: A Hybrid Vision-Language-Action Model for Scalable Autonomous Driving
papers.title_cn: DriveMoe：可扩展的混合视觉-语言-动作驾驶模型
papers.summary: DriveMoe提出混合VLA架构，融合稀疏MoE与密集Transformer以平衡效率与性能。在nuScenes和NAVSIM上取得SOTA。

papers.title: GaussianWorld: Gaussian World Model for Autonomous Driving
papers.title_cn: GaussianWorld：基于高斯世界模型的自动驾驶场景表示与预测
papers.summary: GaussianWorld以4D高斯场景表示为世界模型核心，统一完成感知+预测+规划。用稀疏3D查询从多视图图像中重建高斯参数，时间平滑项保证时序一致性。

papers.title: End-to-End Autonomous Driving with Safety Guidance
papers.title_cn: 带安全引导的端到端自动驾驶
papers.summary: DriveSafer针对生成式端到端规划器的灾难性安全失败，在训练时加入安全约束、推理时加入安全引导。相比DiffusionDrive减少48%灾难性失败，驶入区域合规失败减少65%。

papers.title: CLOVER: Closed-Loop Value Estimation & Ranking for End-to-End Autonomous Driving Planning
papers.title_cn: CLOVER：端到端自动驾驶规划的闭环价值估计与排序
papers.authors: Sining Ang, Yuguang Yang, Canyu Chen, Yan Wang
papers.summary: 提出Generator-Scorer框架解决训练-评估不匹配问题。保守闭环自蒸馏使scorer辅助generator优化，NAVSIM上PDMS 94.5/EPDMS 90.4达到SOTA。

papers.title: EponaV2: Driving World Model with Comprehensive Future Reasoning
papers.title_cn: EponaV2：全面未来推理的驾驶世界模型
papers.authors: Jiawei Xu, Zhizhou Zhong, Zhijian Shu, Mingkai Jia, Mingxiao Li, Jia-Wang Bian, Qian Zhang, Kaicheng Zhang, Jin Xie, Jian Yang
papers.summary: 超越纯帧预测，训练世界模型预测未来几何和语义地图。引入流匹配GRPO机制，NAVSIM感知-free模型SOTA（+1.3 PDMS/+5.5 EPDMS）。

papers.title: MAPLE: Latent Multi-Agent Play for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.title_cn: MAPLE：端到端自动驾驶的潜空间多智能体博弈框架
papers.authors: Rajeev Yasarla, Deepti Hegde, Hsin-Pai Cheng, Shizhong Han, Yunxiao Shi, Meysam Sadeghigooghari, Hanno Ackermann, Litian Liu, Pranav Desai, Fatih Porikli, Mohammad Ghavamzadeh, Hong Cai
papers.summary: 在VLA潜空间中实现反应式多智能体rollout，两阶段训练：潜空间SFT + RL（全局+智能体奖励）。引入多样性奖励生成日志外行为。无需外部模拟器，可扩展的闭环训练。Bench2Drive SOTA。

papers.title: Causality-Aware End-to-End Autonomous Driving via Ego-Centric Joint Scene Modeling
papers.authors: Moon, Seokha; Lee, Minseung; Seo, Joon; Kim, Jinkyu; Lee, Jungbeom
papers.summary: 提出因果感知的端到端驾驶方法CaAD，通过以自我为中心联合场景建模，建模自车与周围智能体的因果相互依赖关系，实现更一致的轨迹预测。

papers.title: Guide, Think, Act: Interactive Embodied Reasoning in Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.title_cn: GTA-VLA：VLA模型的交互式具身推理
papers.authors: Yiran Ling, Qing Lian, Jinghang Li, Qing Jiang, Tianming Zhang, Xiaoke Jiang, Chuanxiu Liu, Jie Liu, Lei Zhang
papers.summary: 提出三阶段Guide-Think-Act VLA框架，允许用户通过视觉线索实时引导机器人策略。突破端到端Sense-to-Act在OOD下的脆弱性，实现可纠错的交互式执行。

papers.title: Driving Intents Amplify Planning-Oriented Reinforcement Learning
papers.summary: 提出DIAL框架，用离散意图标签+CFG扩展flow-matching采样子空间，再用multi-intent GRPO进行偏好对齐强化学习。在WOD-E2E上首次超越人类演示(RFS 9.14 vs 8.13)。

papers.title: MindVLA-U1: VLA Beats VA with Unified Streaming Architecture for Autonomous Driving
papers.title_cn: MindVLA-U1：统一流式架构让VLA超越VA的自动驾驶方案
papers.authors: Yuzhou Huang, Benjin Zhu, Hengtong Lu, Victor Shea-Jay Huang, Haiming Zhang, Wei Chen, Jifeng Dai, Yan Xie, Hongsheng Li
papers.summary: 首次证明VLA架构在规划质量上超越传统VA。统一VLM骨干在单次前向传播中同时生成语言token（可选）和流匹配连续动作轨迹。全流式设计逐帧处理驾驶视频，无需固定视频-动作块。学习式流式分布对齐实现平滑轨迹演化。

papers.title: Action Emergence from Streaming Intent
papers.title_cn: 流式意图驱动的端到端驾驶动作涌现
papers.authors: Pengfei Jing, Victor Shea-Jay Huang, Hengtong Lu, Jifeng Dai, Yan Xie, Benjin Zhu
papers.summary: 提出Streaming Intent范式：自回归解码四步推理链并发射意图token，意图驱动CFG流匹配动作头，仅2步去噪即可生成轨迹。Waymo E2E榜RFS 7.96 val / 7.74 test。首次实现全端到端VLA的意图可控性。

papers.title: Reinforcing VLAs in Task-Agnostic World Models
papers.reasoning: 在任务无关世界模型中对VLA进行RL后训练。直接结合VLA+世界模型+RL，与VLA for driving高度相关。
papers.abstract: Post-training Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models via reinforcement learning (RL) in learned world models has emerged as an effective strategy to adapt to new tasks without costly real-world interactions.

papers.title: Is Your Driving World Model an All-Around Player?
papers.authors: Tianqi Yang, Xinpeng Ding, Ning Sui, et al.
papers.summary: 提出WorldLens统一基准，评测驾驶世界模型在真实性、物理一致性、闭环规划等多维度的保真度

papers.title: C-CoT: Counterfactual Chain-of-Thought with Vision-Language Models for Safe Autonomous Driving
papers.authors: Haicheng Liao, Zhenning Li, Huan Lin, et al.
papers.summary: 提出反事实思维链方法，结合VLM进行安全关键规划，在低概率高风险场景中进行因果推理决策

papers.title: DeepSight: Long-Horizon World Modeling via Latent States Prediction for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.authors: Lingjun Zhang, Changjie Wu, Linzhe Shi, et al.
papers.summary: 提出面向端到端自动驾驶的长时序潜在状态世界模型，集成VLM架构进行深度视觉推理

papers.title: CoWorld-VLA: Thinking in a Multi-Expert World Model for Autonomous Driving
papers.authors: Minqing Huang, Yujiao Xiang, Zihan Liang, et al.
papers.summary: 提出多专家世界推理框架，在潜在空间进行世界推理并直接条件化动作生成，解决文本CoT丢失时空结构的问题

papers.title: DriveFuture: Future-Aware Latent World Models for Autonomous Driving
papers.authors: Yiran Jing, Yunkang Wang, Wenbo Shao, et al.
papers.summary: 提出面向规划的潜在世界模型，学习规划导向的前瞻感知，显式解耦当前与未来特征

papers.title: VECTOR-Drive: Tightly Coupled Vision-Language and Trajectory Expert Routing for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.authors: Rui Zhao, Jianlin Yu, Zhenhai Gao, et al.
papers.summary: 提出紧耦合VLA+轨迹专家路由架构，通过共享编码器保持多模态交互同时减少语言推理与轨迹预测的耦合冲突

papers.title: SceneFactory: GPU-Accelerated Multi-Agent Driving Simulation with Physics-Based Vehicle Dynamics
papers.authors: Zhu, Yicheng; Chen, Yang; Li, Tao; Bian, Zilin
papers.summary: 提出SceneFactory GPU加速驾驶仿真器，在保持物理保真度的同时实现大规模并行训练，桥接GPU批量仿真与物理精确动力学之间的鸿沟。

papers.title: VLADriver-RAG: Retrieval-Augmented Vision-Language-Action Models for Autonomous Driving
papers.authors: Rui Zhao, Haofeng Hu, Zhenhai Gao, et al.
papers.summary: 提出检索增强VLA框架，通过结构化检索知识库+可微分场景编码器克服隐式参数泛化瓶颈

papers.title: GEM: Generating LiDAR World Model via Deformable Mamba
papers.authors: Yang Wu, Zhaojiang Liu, Qiang Meng, et al.
papers.summary: 首个利用Deformable Mamba的LiDAR世界模型，解决点云无序性和动静态分离挑战

papers.title: See Tomorrow, Act Today: Foresight-Driven Autonomous Driving
papers.authors: Bozhou Zhang, Nan Song, Yuang Wang, et al.
papers.summary: 提出前瞻式自动驾驶规划框架，先通过世界模型想象未来场景再做决策，从反应式转为前瞻式范式

papers.title: VLA-Driver: Vision-Language-Action Pretraining for Urban Driving
papers.summary: 大规模VLA预训练框架，在nuScenes等数据集上实现SOTA驾驶性能

papers.title: VLANeXt: Recipes for Building Strong VLA Models
papers.reasoning: 系统探究VLA构建方法：视觉编码器、动作预测头、训练策略。VLA的基础性工作。
papers.abstract: Following the rise of large foundation models, Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs) emerged, leveraging strong visual and language understanding from Vision-Language Models for general-purpose policy learning. VLANeXt explores recipes for building strong VLA models.

papers.title: KnowVal: A Knowledge-Augmented and Value-Guided Autonomous Driving System
papers.summary: 知识增强+价值引导的端到端自动驾驶系统。三大模块：(1) 检索引导的开放世界感知；(2) 驱动知识图谱；(3) 世界模型+人类偏好价值模型。nuScenes最低碰撞率，Bench2Drive/NVISIM SOTA。

papers.title: SimScale: Learning to Drive via Real-World Simulation at Scale
papers.authors: Haochen Tian, Tianyu Li, Haochen Liu, Jiazhi Yang et al.
papers.summary: CVPR 2026 Oral。通过轨迹扰动+响应环境模拟+神经渲染生成大规模仿真数据。NAVSIM v2 navhard +8.6 EPDMS，性能随仿真数据量平滑扩展。CASIA/OpenDriveLab/小米汽车联合。

papers.title: Multimodal Action Diffusion for Robust End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: 提出Action Diffusion Transformer (ADT)，一种anchor-free扩散transformer原生建模多模态驾驶动作分布。生成K个action候选并通过最近邻匹配选择，在Bench2Drive上超越SOTA，延迟降低10倍。论证动作多模态性对表征质量和训练稳定性的核心作用。

papers.title: Intercepting the Future: Latent-Space Predictive World Model for Dynamic VLA Manipulation
papers.abstract: 提出AHEAD (Anticipatory Horizon Extrapolation with Adaptive Dynamics)，一种predict-then-act包装器，用运动感知潜空间世界模型增强冻结的VLA。预测未来patch token，使用语言-运动显著掩码聚焦任务相关区域，自适应预测视界。仅增加4.9M参数，在动态场景中79-97%成功率（基线31-58%），真机实验大幅超越基线。

papers.title: DriveMA: Driving Vision-Language-Action Models with verifiable Meta-Actions
papers.abstract: Driving VLA framework with verifiable meta-actions and action-centric supervised training. Uses trajectory-grounded annotation and RL with turn-level credit assignment. SOTA on Waymo (8.060 RFS with 2B, 8.079 with 4B).

papers.title: Does Visual Information Play a Decisive Role in Vision-Language-Action Model Driving Behavior?
papers.abstract: Structured multi-level visual perturbation framework to analyze visual-behavior dependency in VLA-based driving models. Reveals evaluation-dependent dependency patterns and uneven visual grounding across abstraction levels.

papers.title: Scaling-Aware Data Selection for End-to-End Driving (MOSAIC)
papers.summary: 面向端到端驾驶的缩放感知数据选择方法。

papers.title: CycleBEV: Regularizing View Transformation Networks via View Cycle Consistency
papers.summary: 通过视角循环一致性正则化BEV视图变换网络，增强几何一致性。

papers.title: YoCausal: How Far is Video Generation from World Model? A Causality Perspective
papers.summary: 从因果视角评估视频扩散模型是否真正理解因果关系。提出YoCausal两级基准(RSI+CCI)，评估13个SOTA VDM发现时间箭头感知≠因果理解。

papers.title: minWM: A Full-Stack Open-Source Framework for Real-Time Interactive Video World Models
papers.summary: 全栈开源实时交互视频世界模型框架。将双向T2V/TI2V模型转为相机可控的少步自回归世界模型。支持Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B和HY1.5-TI2V-8B骨干。

papers.title: Mitigating State Aliasing in Vision-Language-Action Models via Inverse Dynamics Learning
papers.summary: 引入逆动力学学习作为辅助目标缓解VLA状态混淆问题。通过预测当前到未来观测的动作，增强编码器对细粒度视觉差异的敏感度。CALVIN和SimplerEnv上表现一致提升。

papers.title: VLA-Pro: Cross-Task Procedural Memory Transfer for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.summary: 通过存储任务相关程序性记忆增强VLA跨任务泛化。训练时存LoRA适配器，推理时基于多模态上下文检索融合。实现207%相对提升，真实世界成功率5.8%→65.0%。

papers.title: 3DVLA: Enhancing Vision-Language-Action Models via 3D Spatial and Instance Understanding
papers.summary: 为VLA注入3D推理能力的即插即用框架。解决3D空间位置提取、实例理解、遮挡推理三大挑战，无需额外标注。在LIBERO-Plus和RoboTwin上展示一致提升。

papers.title: ReasonBreak: Probing Vulnerabilities in Reasoning-Enabled Vision-Language-Action Models for Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: 首个系统性的黑盒攻击研究，针对推理增强型VLA驾驶模型（基于NVIDIA Alpamayo）。发现真实输入扰动可达89%推理攻击成功率和72%轨迹操控成功率，碰撞率显著上升。引入推理感知评估框架和ReasonBreak基准。

papers.title: Gamma-World: Generative Multi-Agent World Modeling Beyond Two Players
papers.summary: 生成式多智能体世界模型。提出Simplex Rotary Agent Encoding实现置换等价智能体表示，及Sparse Hub Attention降低跨智能体注意力复杂度至线性。24 FPS实时rollout。

papers.title: Ω-QVLA: Robust Quantization for Vision-Language-Action Models via Composite Rotation and Per-step Scaling
papers.summary: 首个将VLA模型语言骨干和扩散动作头统一压缩至W4A4的训练后量化框架。Pi0.5和GR00T N1.5上保持98%以上成功率，静态显存减少71.3%。

papers.title: Sparse-LiDAR Prompting of Monocular Geometry Foundations: An Empirical Study Toward Long-Range Driving Depth
papers.abstract: SLIM: 首个将 MoGe-2 适配接受真正稀疏 LiDAR 输入的工作。部分卷积稀疏编码器 + 多尺度融合 neck。在 100-150m 范围将 MoGe-2 基线绝对相对误差降低 39-51%。
papers.key_contribution: 稀疏 LiDAR 注入单目几何基础模型，显著提升远距离驾驶深度估计

papers.title: When Does Adaptive Guidance Help? Belief-Aware Privileged Distillation for Autonomous Driving Under Partial Observability
papers.abstract: 提出 Belief-Aware GSAC (BA-GSAC)，通过 ensemble disagreement 动态调节蒸馏系数 λ。系统研究了自适应指导何时真正有效：轻中度部分可观测性下有效，但严重遮挡下 λ 快速坍缩。发现线性衰减调度比自适应方法更稳定。被 CVPR 2026 WAD 录用。
papers.key_contribution: 揭示 teacher-student 蒸馏中自适应系数的局限性，为不确定性感知框架提供设计指导

papers.title: DRIVESPATIAL: A Benchmark for Spatiotemporal Intelligence in Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: 面向自动驾驶时空智能的基准测试，评估VLM在驾驶场景中的时空推理能力。

papers.title: Branch-Stochastic Model Predictive Control for Motion Planning under Multi-Modal Uncertainty with Scenario Clustering
papers.authors: Zekun Xing, Ramkrishna Chaudhari, Marion Leibold, Dirk Wollherr, Martin Buss
papers.summary: 面向自动驾驶运动规划的分支随机MPC方法。处理周围车辆意图和轨迹的多模态不确定性。通过场景聚类对不确定性进行分支处理，在鲁棒性和非保守性之间取得平衡。

papers.title: Diffusion-guided Generalizable Enhancer for Urban Scene Reconstruction
papers.authors: Henry Che, Jingkang Wang, Yun Chen, Ze Yang, Sivabalan Manivasagam, Raquel Urtasun
papers.summary: 扩散引导的城市场景重建增强器。现有神经渲染方法在记录轨迹上高保真但视角偏移后质量严重下降。Diffusion-guided Enhancer 利用扩散先验泛化到未见视角，显著提升大规模视角偏移下的重建质量。Waabi/Uber ATG团队。

papers.title: Learning A Unified Risk Map for Autonomous Driving in Partially Observable Environments
papers.summary: 面向部分可观测环境的统一风险图建模与学习框架。融合交通流风险与碰撞风险的时空建模，并引入扩散模型生成对抗性遮拦场景用于训练。Waymo Open Motion Dataset上最小碰撞时间提升0.78倍，平均碰撞时间提升1.67倍。IEEE RA-L已收录。

papers.title: Efficient Agentic Reasoning Through Self-Regulated Simulative Planning
papers.authors: Mingkai Deng, Jinyu Hou, Lara Sá Neves, Varad Pimpalkhute, Taylor W. Killian, Zhengzhong Liu, Eric P. Xing
papers.summary: 提出自调节模拟规划框架，让智能体自主决定何时、如何、以及是否进行规划推理。核心思想是规划质量感知的控制——通过量化当前状态执行规划的价值来决定计算资源分配。解决 reactive policy 中隐含规划缺乏结构化控制的问题。

papers.title: EvoScene-VLA: Evolving Scene Beliefs Inside the Action Decoder for Chunked Robot Control
papers.reasoning: 在VLA action decoder内部演化场景信念，解决遮挡和物体运动问题。机器人领域但与驾驶VLA有交叉。
papers.abstract: Chunked vision-language-action (VLA) policies predict multi-step robot controls, conditioning each update on the current visual observation alone. EvoScene-VLA evolves scene beliefs inside the action decoder, addressing challenges of contact, occlusion, and object motion.

papers.title: stable-worldmodel: A Platform for Reproducible World Modeling Research and Evaluation
papers.authors: Lucas Maes, Quentin Le Lidec, Luiz Facury, Nassim Massaudi, Ayush Chaurasia, Francesco Capuano, Richard Gao, Taj Gillin, Dan Haramati, Damien Scieur, Yann LeCun, Randall Balestriero
papers.summary: 世界模型领域第一个标准化可复现研究平台。整合不同数据管道、训练协议和评估方法，提供统一的基准测试环境。解决世界模型研究碎片化问题，支持公平对比和可复现性。

papers.title: Lost in Fog: Sensor Perturbations Expose Reasoning Fragility in Driving VLAs
papers.reasoning: 研究Driving VLA在传感器退化(雾、噪声等)下的推理脆弱性，对实际部署安全性有参考价值。
papers.abstract: Interpretable autonomous driving planners depend not only on generating explanations, but also on those explanations remaining reliable under real-world sensor degradation. A controlled perturbation study of VLA robustness under sensor degradation.

papers.title: Distill to Think, Foresee to Act: Cognitive-Physical Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Driving
papers.reasoning: 用RL突破IL上限，结合认知基础模型+世界模型预测。端到端驾驶+RL方向的重要探索。
papers.abstract: Current end-to-end autonomous driving models are fundamentally constrained by the behavioral cloning ceiling of imitation learning. Distill to Think, Foresee to Act proposes using RL with (1) a cognitive foundation model for reasoning and (2) a physical world model for foresight.
papers.summary: VLM蒸馏+自回归BEV世界模型+GRPO强化学习的认知物理框架，突破IL天花板

papers.title: VL-DPO: Vision-Language-Guided Finetuning for Preference-Aligned Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: ICRA 2026：VLM零样本生成偏好对+DPO微调实现人类偏好对齐，RFS↑11.94%

papers.title: Towards Robust Vision-Language-Action Models without Extra Data
papers.title_cn: 无需额外数据的鲁棒VLA模型
papers.summary: 提出IB-Adapter（信息瓶颈适配器），无需额外数据或增强，在可见扰动下VLA模型性能提升30%。0.5B参数StableVLA即可匹敌7B模型鲁棒性。

papers.title: Gaussian Evolution Model for Occupancy Forecasting and Motion Planning
papers.title_cn: 高斯演化模型：用于占据预测与运动规划的场景演化
papers.summary: GEM以显式连续4D高斯原语表示驾驶场景，直接查询任意时间戳的高斯世界表示进行非自回归占据预测和运动规划，避免自回归误差累积。

papers.title: Identifiable Token Correspondence for World Models
papers.reasoning: 解决token世界模型长程rollout中的时间不一致问题(物体重复/消失)，对世界模型稳定性有贡献。
papers.abstract: Token-based transformer world models have shown strong performance in visual reinforcement learning, but often suffer from temporal inconsistency in long-horizon rollouts. Identifiable Token Correspondence addresses object duplication, disappearance, and transmutation.

papers.title: SANA-WM: Efficient Minute-Scale World Modeling with Hybrid Linear Diffusion Transformer
papers.title_cn: SANA-WM：混合线性注意力扩散Transformer的高效分钟级世界建模
papers.authors: Haoyi Zhu, Haozhe Liu, Yuyang Zhao, Tian Ye, Junsong Chen, Jincheng Yu, Tong He, Song Han, Enze Xie
papers.summary: 2.6B参数开源世界模型，原生支持720p分钟级视频生成和6-DoF相机控制。仅213K视频训练，36×吞吐量优于基线。蒸馏版RTX5090上60s视频仅34s。

papers.title: Learning Direct Control Policies with Flow Matching for Autonomous Driving
papers.title_cn: 流匹配直接控制策略的自动驾驶规划
papers.authors: Marcello Ceresini, Federico Pirazzoli, Andrea Bertogalli, Lorenzo Cipelli, Filippo D'Addeo, Anthony Dell'Eva, Alessandro Paolo Capasso, Alberto Broggi
papers.summary: 流匹配规划器直接输出加速度/曲率控制轨迹，以BEV栅格为条件，少量ODE步实现实时重规划。仅城市仿真数据训练，泛化到高速公路等OOD场景。

papers.title: Learning Responsibility-Attributed Adversarial Scenarios for Testing Autonomous Vehicles
papers.authors: Xiao, Yizhuo; Yan, Haotian; Wang, Ying; Zhu, Zhongpan; Zhang, Yuxin
papers.summary: 提出CARS方法，生成可归责责任的对抗性驾驶场景，区分系统缺陷导致的故障与不可避免的交通冲突，提升自动驾驶安全验证的可信度。

papers.title: OOM-Free Alpamayo via CPU-GPU Memory Swapping for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.authors: Marco Coscuy, Zewei Zhou, Seth Z. Zhao, et al.
papers.summary: 提出CPU-GPU内存交换方案解决VLA模型部署时20-60GB显存瓶颈，实现OOM-free推理

papers.title: MDrive: Benchmarking Closed-Loop Cooperative Driving for End-to-End Multi-agent Systems
papers.authors: Shihao Huo, Tianze Gao, Jingxian Li, et al.
papers.summary: 提出V2X闭环协同驾驶基准，评估端到端多智能体系统的行为多样性与交互能力

papers.title: Unified Noise Steering for Efficient Human-Guided VLA Adaptation
papers.authors: Zhanhua Zhang, Yifan Li, Chen Wang, et al.
papers.summary: 提出统一噪声引导框架用于VLA高效适应，结合人类反馈引导实际部署分布

papers.title: Temporal Sampling Frequency Matters: A Capacity-Aware Study of End-to-End Driving Trajectory Prediction
papers.authors: Zhiwei Lin, Yifan Sun, Chenxu Luo, et al.
papers.summary: 将时序采样频率作为显式训练设计变量，发现高频率并非最优，验证容量感知的频率选择

papers.title: MTA-RL: Robust Urban Driving via Multi-modal Transformer-based 3D Affordances and Reinforcement Learning
papers.authors: Guangli Chen, Dianzhao Li, Wenjian Zhong, et al.
papers.summary: 提出多模态Transformer 3D可通行性+RL的鲁棒城市驾驶框架，结合可解释3D场景理解与强化学习决策

papers.title: HiDrive: A Closed-Loop Benchmark for High-Level Autonomous Driving
papers.authors: Yuqi Wang, Yilan Li, Kai Chen, et al.
papers.summary: 提出高阶闭环驾驶基准，覆盖长尾场景、多目标多样性等现有基准饱和后的能力评估缺口

papers.title: Latency Analysis and Optimization of Alpamayo 1 via Efficient Trajectory Generation
papers.authors: Yunseong Jeon, Namcheol Lee, Yoonsu Lee, et al.
papers.summary: 分析推理型E2E系统的延迟瓶颈，提出推理压缩+轨迹预生成+轻量级规划器实现4倍加速

papers.title: Unified Modeling of Lane and Lane Topology for Driving Scene Reasoning
papers.authors: Li, Han; Gao, Yulu; Liu, Si; Wang, Yuhang; Liu, Bo
papers.summary: 提出统一的车道与车道拓扑建模方法，打破传统先检测后推理范式，在端到端框架中同时学习车道线和拓扑关系。

papers.title: Preserving Foundational Capabilities in Flow-Matching VLAs through Conservative SFT
papers.authors: Zhongkai Zhao, Jialiang Wang, Boyuan Chen, et al.
papers.summary: 提出保守SFT(ConSFT)，防止流匹配VLA模型微调时灾难性遗忘，动态缩放学习信号

papers.title: Enhancing Consistency Models for Multi-Agent Trajectory Prediction
papers.authors: Mrdovic, Alen; Qingze; Liu; Li, Danrui; Schwartz, Mathew
papers.summary: 改进一致性模型实现多智能体轨迹预测的真实单步生成，解决扩散模型推理延迟问题，适用于自动驾驶等时延敏感场景。

papers.title: Can Attribution Predict Risk? From Multi-View Attribution to Planning Risk Signals in End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.authors: Le Yang, Ruoyu Chen, Haijun Liu, et al.
papers.summary: 提出多视角归因→规划风险信号的转换方法，利用归因图预测规划风险，实现可解释安全监控

papers.title: SimPB++: Simultaneously Detecting 2D and 3D Objects from Multiple Cameras
papers.authors: Yingqi Tang, Zhaotie Meng, Erkang Cheng, Haibin Ling
papers.summary: 统一2D透视和3D BEV检测的端到端模型，支持混合监督

papers.title: Physically Native World Models: A Hamiltonian Perspective on Generative World Modeling
papers.abstract: 从 Hamiltonian 力学视角构建生成式世界模型，保持物理一致性。已有详细分析。
papers.key_contribution: 基于 Hamiltonian 力学的物理一致世界模型框架

papers.title: VLM-VPI: A Vision-Language Reasoning Framework for Improving Automated Vehicle-Pedestrian Interactions
papers.authors: Qingwen Pu, Kun Xie, Yuxiang Liu
papers.summary: 利用Qwen3-VL+GPT-OSS实现行人意图理解与年龄感知的差异化刹车控制

papers.title: Frozen LLMs as Map-Aware Spatio-Temporal Reasoners for Vehicle Trajectory Prediction
papers.authors: Yanjiao Liu, Jiawei Liu, Xun Gong, Zifei Nie
papers.summary: 利用frozen LLM作为推理引擎进行轨迹预测，结合HD map语义信息

papers.title: Reasoning About Traversability: Language-Guided Off-Road 3D Trajectory Planning
papers.summary: 语言引导的越野轨迹规划，通过action-aligned标注和地形感知优化实现单图3D轨迹推断

papers.title: Post-Training Vision-Language Models for Safety-Critical Autonomous Driving Events
papers.title_cn: 视觉语言模型后训练用于安全关键驾驶事件检测
papers.summary: VLM-AutoDrive提出模块化后训练框架，使通用VLM适配安全关键驾驶事件检测（碰撞/近碰撞），将Cosmos-Reason1的Collision F1从0.00提升到0.69。

papers.title: MapGCLR: Geospatial Contrastive Learning for Online Vectorized HD Map Construction
papers.summary: 利用多趟次地理重叠的 BEV 特征构建地理空间对比学习（InfoNCE损失），实现半监督在线 HD Map。仅用5%标注数据即达到18.9 mAP（超越全监督13.3基线42%）。

papers.title: RESBev: Making BEV Perception More Robust
papers.summary: 插件式BEV感知鲁棒增强框架，利用潜空间世界模型预测来自历史帧的干净BEV语义先验，再通过异常重建器与污染当前观测融合。在 nuScenes 上使四种 LSS 模型在10种扰动下平均提升15-20 IoU。

papers.title: Drive-P2D: A Progressive Perception-to-Decision Benchmark for VLMs in Autonomous Driving
papers.authors: Zecong Tang, Zixu Wang, Yifei Wang et al.
papers.abstract: 为自动驾驶 VLM 设计渐进式感知到决策 benchmark，系统评估 VLM 在推理各阶段的能力边界。
papers.key_contribution: VLM 自动驾驶渐进式评估基准，覆盖感知→决策全流程

papers.title: The Lie We Tell: Correcting the Euclidean Fallacy in Vision Language Action Policies via Score Matching on Tangent Space
papers.abstract: 指出VLA策略将SE(3)姿态视为平坦R^12向量的欧几里得谬误。提出Lie Diffuser Actor (LDA)，在SE(3)流形上运行的扩散框架，通过左不变SDE注入噪声、切空间分数预测、指数映射回缩。消除流形漂移并保证坐标框架等变性。CALVIN ABC→D提升7.3%。ICML 2026接收。

papers.title: Not All Points Are Equal: Uncertainty-Aware 4D LiDAR Scene Synthesis

papers.title: Learning Action-Conditional and Object-Centric Gaussian Splatting World Models for Rigid Objects

papers.title: RoboDream: Compositional World Models for Scalable Robot Data Synthesis

papers.title: DecMem: Towards Minute-Long Consistent World Generation with Decoupled Memory
papers.abstract: Decoupled memory architecture for long-horizon world generation. Sparse Global Memory + Anchored Local Memory addressing attention dispersion. Minute-level controllable long video generation.

papers.title: Light Interaction: Training-Free Inference Acceleration for Interactive Video World Models
papers.abstract: Training-free inference acceleration for interactive video world models. Combines adaptive context management, denoising cache, and 3D block sparse attention. Up to 2.59x speedup on HY-WorldPlay and Matrix-Game-3.0.

papers.title: Can BEV Perception Gracefully Degrade under Sensor Failures?
papers.abstract: Grace-BEV: lightweight plug-and-play framework for active reliability-aware multi-modal fusion. Recovers from catastrophic LiDAR failure (0.0% → 34.7% mAP) and improves clean accuracy by 1.4%. Three-Phase Training with Modality Dropout.

papers.title: V2XCrafter: Learning to Generate Driving Scene Across Agents

papers.abstract: SOLAR proposes a self-optimizing open-ended autonomous agent for lifelong learning.

papers.title: 📚 本周论文精选 (2026-05-25 ~ 05-31)
papers.summary: 本周精选5篇：(1) VisualThink-VLA: 视觉中间推理替代文本CoT, 22.8x延迟降; (2) DriveWAM: 视频扩散先验→世界动作模型, 数据scaling潜力; (3) DeGO: 可变形高斯占用, 解耦刚体/非刚体运动, 弱监督占用SOTA; (4) GEM: 深度图生成作为VLM预训练监督; (5) TPS-Drive: 任务导向表示净化, 解决VLM空间幻觉。

papers.title: CLEAR: Cognition and Latent Evaluation for Adaptive Routing in End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: CLEAR combines Drive-JEPA visual encoder with single-step conditional drift in VAE latent space to replace multi-step denoising. Uses Qwen 3.5 0.8B for scene understanding to guide adaptive scheduling and cross-attention scoring. Achieves SOTA 93.7 PDMS on NAVSIM v1. Addresses diffusion latency vs multi-modal diversity trade-off.

papers.title: PLAN-S: Bridging Planning with Latent Style Dynamics for Autonomous Driving World Models
papers.summary: PLAN-S decodes style-conditioned 4-channel semantic cost maps from latent world model representations, enabling explicit risk/drivability/style modeling. Validated on ResWorld (nuScenes, 0.55m avg L2, 42% collision reduction) and WoTE (NAVSIM, 89.4 PDMS). Bridges the compactness-controllability dilemma in LWM-based planners.

papers.title: Discrete-WAM: Unified Discrete Vision-Action Token Editing for World-Policy Learning
papers.summary: Discrete-WAM unifies world model and policy into a discrete vision-action token framework, enabling compositional causal reasoning across counterfactual futures. Uses discrete diffusion for joint world modeling, world-action policy, and hierarchical decision-making. Supports controllable generation and counterfactual reasoning.

papers.title: D$^3$-MoE: Dual Disentangled Diffusion Mixture-of-Experts for Style-Controllable End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: D3-MoE disentangles trajectory modeling along behavioral axis (generation vs selection) and physical axis (longitudinal vs lateral). Uses Diffusion Transformers with style-conditioned AdaLN. SOTA 88.2 PDMS (91.3 with ensemble) on NAVSIM. Enables style-controllable end-to-end driving without manual labels.

papers.title: Bridging Predictive Uncertainty and Safe Action: Sample-Conditioned Differentiable Planning for Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: Proposes sample-conditioned differentiable planning that feeds diffusion-generated future scenarios into a differentiable planner with CVaR tail-risk constraints. Uses directed graph for scene context. Outperforms SOTA on Waymo Open Motion and Argoverse 2. Bridges uncertainty modeling with interpretable safe planning.

papers.title: NVIDIA OmniDreams: Real-Time Generative World Model for Closed-Loop Autonomous Vehicle Simulation
papers.summary: NVIDIA introduces OmniDreams, a real-time generative world model mid/post-trained from Cosmos diffusion model on 21k hours driving data. Autoregressively generates action-conditioned videos for closed-loop simulation. Supports extreme weather and dynamic agents. Preliminary results show WAM post-trained from OmniDreams surpasses VLA-based Alpamayo 1.5 with 1/5 params.

papers.title: RiskFlow: Fast and Faithful Safety-Critical Traffic Scenario Generation
papers.summary: RiskFlow formulates safety-critical scenario generation as transport in action space, learning velocity fields for single-pass generation instead of iterative denoising. Uses JVP-based training. Achieves strong adversariality-realism trade-off on nuScenes, with substantially reduced inference time vs diffusion baselines.

papers.title: StandardE2E: A Unified Framework for End-to-End Autonomous Driving Datasets
papers.summary: StandardE2E provides a unified interface over 6 E2E driving datasets (Waymo E2E, Waymo Perception, Argoverse 2 Sensor/LiDAR, NAVSIM, WayveScenes101). Standardizes preprocessing under one schema, enables cross-dataset training. Released as open-source Python package.

papers.title: MapAgent: An Industrial-Grade Agentic Framework for City-scale Lane-level Map Generation
papers.summary: MapAgent augments vectorization backbone with Judge-Planner-Worker agent loop for specification-compliant lane-map generation. Vision-language Judge diagnoses errors, tool-calling Planner generates corrective edits. Integrated into Baidu Maps for 360+ cities with >95% production automation.

papers.title: IDOL: Inverse-Dynamics-Guided Future Prediction for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: IDOL uses inverse dynamics model to decode transition-aware trajectory features from latent BEV world model predictions, turning future forecasting into actionable planning guidance. Lightweight closed-loop refinement module. SOTA on NAVSIM v1/v2 benchmarks among comparable world-model-based approaches.

papers.title: AffordanceVLA: A Vision-Language-Action Model Empowering Action Generation through Affordance-Aware Understanding
papers.summary: 提出 AffordanceVLA 框架，通过结构化 affordance 预测作为任务导向的中间表示，弥补 VLM 语义空间与具身控制策略之间的结构不匹配。包含 Which2Act（物体级聚焦）、Where2Act（2D交互定位）、How2Act（3D几何推理）三个互补模块，实现视觉-语言-动作的自然桥接。

papers.title: LiAuto-GeoX: Efficient Grounded Driving Transformer
papers.summary: 提出 LiAuto-GeoX，一种高效的驾驶场景 3D 感知 Transformer，利用稀疏 LiDAR 先验提供远距离区域的几何基准，通过几何保持蒸馏将大模型压缩为紧凑的 155M 参数车载模型。在 KITTI 上达到 220 FPS，支持实时环视 3D 场景理解。

papers.title: Let It Be Simple: One-Step Action Generation for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.summary: 论证 VLA 动作生成与图像生成的条件-目标结构不同：策略以丰富的观测、语言和状态为条件，但预测的是紧凑的低维动作块。通过将训练时间分布偏向高噪声状态，无需教师模型或蒸馏即可实现单步动作生成，匹配十步解码性能。1.4B VLM 模型在 LIBERO-Long 上达到 95.6%。

papers.title: Thinking with Imagination: Agentic Visual Spatial Reasoning with World Simulators
papers.summary: 提出用想象思考范式，让 VLM 主动获取想象的可视化证据以改进空间推理。VLM 利用世界模拟器（如 3D 场景生成器）生成假设视角的图像，实现跨视角一致性和隐含布局的空间推理，弥补仅依赖观测图像的局限性。
